hooks.name: planning-session-start
hooks.description: Check for previous planning session and recover context

hooks.name: planning-before-tool
hooks.description: Read plan context before tool use to keep goals in attention

hooks.name: planning-after-tool
hooks.description: Remind agent to update progress after file changes

hooks.name: planning-before-model
hooks.description: Inject plan awareness before every model call

hooks.name: planning-session-end
hooks.description: Check all phases are complete before session ends
